TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O tapila' ko patelian to hemay, o cikohaway a dateng i, paroen i cifar ano eca i tipid, awaay ho ko 'alapit itiya, kamayen no 'Amis ko kakomaen i taheka.
S.PHON: o~u tapiɾaʡ ko~u patəɾian to~u ħəmaj, o~u ʦiko~uħawaj a ɬ~ɮatəŋ i, paro~uən i ʦifar ano~u əʦa i tipiɬ~ɮ, awaaj ħo~u ko~u ʡaɾapit itija, kamajən no~u ʡamis ko~u kako~umaən i taħəka.
S.FORM: O tapila' ko patelian to hemay, o cikohaway a dateng i, paroen i cifar ano eca i tipid, awaay ho ko 'alapit itiya, kamayen no 'Amis ko kakomaen i taheka.
S.PHON: o~u tapiɾaʡ ko~u patəɾian to~u ħəmaj, o~u ʦiko~uħawaj a ɬ~ɮatəŋ i, paro~uən i ʦifar ano~u əʦa i tipiɬ~ɮ, awaaj ħo~u ko~u ʡaɾapit itija, kamajən no~u ʡamis ko~u kako~umaən i taħəka.
